title: ClearGrasp: 3D Shape Estimation of Transparent Objects for Manipulation
ccf_a_status: robot venue, not counted as CCF-A here
data_collectability: high; public synthetic train and real/synthetic val-test, RealSense demo
workflow: RGB-D, transparent mask, normals, occlusion boundaries, global depth optimization
innovation_or_threat: classic transparent-object RGB-D depth completion and manipulation baseline
evaluation: depth completion metrics, suction and parallel-jaw manipulation
fit_to_a2: L1 post-hoc baseline and related-work anchor
notes: Do not claim transparent depth correction itself as novelty.

title: RGB-D Local Implicit Function for Depth Completion of Transparent Objects
data_collectability: medium; ClearGrasp plus Omniverse Object Dataset
workflow: RGB-D local implicit function, refinement, hard-negative mining
notes: Environment is old and multi-GPU; reproduction cost medium-high.

title: TransCG: A Large-Scale Real-World Dataset for Transparent Object Depth Completion and a Grasping Baseline
data_collectability: high; 57,715 real RGB-D images, 51 transparent objects, 130 scenes
workflow: RGB-D depth completion with DFNet and grasping baseline
innovation_or_threat: primary real transparent-grasping dataset and baseline
notes: Best starting point for transparent-mask/no-anchor metrics.

title: ClearPose: Large-scale Transparent Object Dataset and Benchmark
data_collectability: high; RGB, raw depth, rendered true depth, normals, 6D pose, adversarial splits
gpu_or_hardware: not reported as unified GPU cost
workflow: dataset and benchmark for depth completion and pose estimation
notes: Useful after TransCG to avoid overfitting one dataset.

title: DREDS / SwinDRNet
data_collectability: medium-high; DREDS synthetic 130k and STD real 38k, non-commercial
workflow: domain-randomized depth simulation, RGB-D restoration, SwinDRNet
innovation_or_threat: sim2real restoration threat for specular/transparent objects
notes: A2 should not pretend data-driven restoration is missing.

title: Booster: A Benchmark for Depth from Images of Specular and Transparent Surfaces
data_collectability: high; high-res stereo/mono, material masks, ToM class, challenge splits
workflow: high-resolution non-Lambertian monocular/stereo depth benchmark
fit_to_a2: metric-vs-affine protocol and ToM mask evaluation
notes: NTIRE 2026 mono uses metric depth in cm; important for A2.

title: Learning Depth Estimation for Transparent and Mirror Surfaces / Depth4ToM
code_status: official code, data, weights; stereo training code partially withheld
data_collectability: high; Trans10K/MSD virtual depths and Booster
workflow: inpainting ToM regions, MDE/stereo pseudo labels, fine-tuning
fit_to_a2: threat to generic transparent MDE adaptation; contrast with A2 training-free/sampling-time route
notes: Must cite if A2 evaluates Booster ToM surfaces.

title: ASGrasp: Generalizable Transparent Object Reconstruction and 6-DoF Grasp Detection from RGB-D Active Stereo Camera
data_collectability: medium; active stereo, MVS, GSNet/GraspNet dependencies
workflow: active stereo reconstruction and 6-DoF grasp detection
innovation_or_threat: sensor/system upper bound for transparent grasping
fit_to_a2: deployment upper bound, not equal-input baseline
notes: Use to state A2 is low-cost/sparse-anchor setting, not replacing active stereo.

title: Towards Robust Monocular Depth Estimation in Non-Lambertian Surfaces
data_collectability: medium; non-Lambertian datasets need checking
workflow: region-guided training and augmentation for non-Lambertian MDE
fit_to_a2: related threat, not first reproduction candidate
notes: Keep as warning against claiming ToM MDE adaptation is new.

title: ClearDepth: Enhanced Stereo Perception of Transparent Objects for Robotic Manipulation
code_or_data_link: code not found in this pass
data_collectability: medium; stereo/sim2real data path needs checking
workflow: stereo ViT and sim2real transparent-object perception
notes: Not first-line A2 baseline unless code appears.

title: MODEST: Monocular Depth Estimation and Segmentation for Transparent Object with Iterative Semantic and Geometric Fusion
data_collectability: high; Syn-TODD and ClearPose
workflow: single RGB segmentation-depth joint learning, iterative semantic/geometric fusion
innovation_or_threat: direct single-RGB transparent depth and segmentation threat
fit_to_a2: if A2 uses masks or semantic priors, must compare or account for mask cost
notes: A2 should include mask-free/noisy-mask ablation if using masks.

title: Seeing and Seeing Through the Glass / LayeredDepth
data_collectability: medium; benchmark public, synthetic generator needs custom Blender/Infinigen
workflow: real and synthetic multi-layer transparent depth benchmark
notes: A2 must not claim complete optical reconstruction.

title: Monocular One-Shot Metric-Depth Alignment for RGB-Based Robot Grasping / MOMA
data_collectability: medium; UR5 and sparse GT depth calibration needed for full reproduction
gpu_or_hardware: paper page reports RTX 3090 real-time inference; training cost not reported
workflow: single RGB MDE, scale-rotation-shift sparse calibration, robot grasp/suction
evaluation: UR5 robot grasping including transparent objects
notes: Most important novelty pressure for A2 transparent route.

title: Rethinking Transparent Object Grasping: Depth Completion with Monocular Depth Estimation and Instance Mask / ReMake
data_collectability: high; ClearGrasp, TransCG, OOD data links
workflow: instance mask, MDE relative depth, original depth, RGB-D completion
fit_to_a2: strong baseline if A2 enters transparent grasping
notes: Count mask/MDE/completion modules in nfe_real or system cost.

title: SeeClear: Reliable Transparent Object Depth Estimation via Generative Opacification
code_status: code-only; pretrained models and dataset coming soon
data_collectability: medium-low today; SeeClear-396k not yet released in README
workflow: mask preparation, conditional diffusion opacification, mask refinement, DA3/MoGe depth
evaluation: transparent-object depth estimation with off-the-shelf MDE
fit_to_a2: strong observation; do not duplicate opacification-only idea
notes: Revisit when weights/data are released.

title: SeeGroup: Multi-Layer Depth Estimation of Transparent Surfaces via Self-Determined Grouping
data_collectability: medium; LayeredDepth data needed
gpu_or_hardware: single/multi-GPU supported; GPU model/time not reported
workflow: unordered point-process multi-layer depth, permutation-invariant likelihood
evaluation: LayeredDepth; repo reports 61.34 to 70.09 quadruplet accuracy improvement
fit_to_a2: conceptual boundary for A2 single-layer metric depth
notes: Limit A2 output to contact/front/grasp-relevant surface.

title: AISPO: Enhancing Depth Reliability for Robotic Manipulation of Non-Lambertian Objects via Affine-Invariant Shape Prior
data_collectability: medium; paper available, reproduction blocked by code
gpu_or_hardware: paper page reports 8x A100 training and RTX3090 evaluation
workflow: affine-invariant shape prior for non-Lambertian depth reliability
innovation_or_threat: very close affine-prior and physical-depth threat
notes: Do not ignore in related work even without code.

title: Robotic Perception of Transparent Objects: A Review
data_collectability: high as reading material
workflow: survey of transparent-object robotic perception
notes: Use for related-work organization.

title: Survey on Monocular Metric Depth Estimation
data_collectability: high as reading material
workflow: survey of metric MDE
notes: Use to justify metric-depth framing.

title: Seeing Glass: Joint Point Cloud and Depth Completion for Transparent Objects
code_or_data_link: code not emphasized in this pass
data_collectability: medium
workflow: point cloud and depth completion for transparent objects
notes: Useful to show joint point-cloud restoration is mature.

title: Dex-NeRF: Using a Neural Radiance Field to Grasp Transparent Objects
code_or_data_link: code not emphasized in this pass
data_collectability: low-medium; multi-view/robot setup heavy
workflow: NeRF-based transparent object grasping
fit_to_a2: system upper bound, not equal-input comparison
notes: Use to bound single-image claims.

title: Transparent Object Depth Completion
data_collectability: medium
workflow: single-view RGB-D completion plus multi-view depth and confidence refinement
notes: Not first-line unless code/data become clear.

title: DepthShield Demo
data_collectability: low-medium; demo-level implementation
workflow: mask-aware head plus inference-time Gaussian blur refinement on ToM surfaces
